# external_doris_table

## Purpose

Declare-only `AssetSpec` for an [Apache Doris](https://doris.apache.org/) table that Doris itself owns the lifecycle of (Flink CDC ‚Üí Doris, Routine Load from Kafka ‚Üí Doris, external Stream Load consumers, etc.). Dagster's role is catalog presence + lineage; no execution.

<!-- FIELDS:START - auto-generated by tools/regen_readme_fields.py -->

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `asset_key` | `str` | Dagster asset key (e.g. 'doris/analytics/events_realtime'). |
| `database` | `str` | Doris database (catalog) name. |
| `table` | `str` | Doris table name. |

### Catalog metadata

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `group_name` | `str` | `"doris"` | Dagster asset group name. |
| `description` | `str` | ‚Äî | Asset description. |
| `owners` | `List[str]` | ‚Äî | Asset owners. |
| `tags` | `Dict[str, str]` | ‚Äî | Catalog tags. |
| `kinds` | `List[str]` | ‚Äî | Asset kinds (auto-includes 'doris'). |
| `deps` | `List[str]` | ‚Äî | Upstream Dagster asset keys. |

### Source / target

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `table_model` | `str` | ‚Äî | Doris table model: 'duplicate' (default) / 'unique' / 'aggregate' / 'mv' (materialized view). Surfaced as metadata; doesn't affect the declare-only AssetSpec. |

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `fe_host` | `str` | ‚Äî | Doris Frontend host ‚Äî surfaced as catalog metadata. |

<!-- FIELDS:END -->

## Example YAML

```yaml
type: dagster_community_components.ExternalDorisTableAsset
attributes:
  asset_key: doris/analytics/events_realtime
  database: analytics
  table: events_realtime
  fe_host: doris-fe.mycompany.com
  table_model: unique
  group_name: doris
```

## Pairs with

- `doris_routine_load_sensor` ‚Äî pointed at the same `asset_key`, the sensor emits AssetObservation on Routine Load health changes for the Kafka‚ÜíDoris job feeding this table.

## Validation level

**code** ‚Äî declare-only path.
